name: map
title: Geo Distribution Map
description: A stylised geographic distribution map rendered by OOW.map: a tokenised plate over a faint coordinate grid scattered with ~11 severity-coloured data points (green to red), each wrapped in a soft, slowly pulsing halo and seeded so it draws identically every load. Used to show where monitored locations / datacenters sit on the health spectrum at a glance. The renderer emits an inline SVG into a declarative mount; CSS supplies the plate, grid stroke, halo pulse, hover lift, focus ring and disabled state from design tokens — only the point fills are palette hexes (generated SVG data). Point count is tunable via data-points.
